name: Add first product to cart from catalogue page

steps.name: Given  user is on the product catalogue page
When  user adds the first product to cart
Then  cart count should be updated
And  product should be visible in cart

labels.name: story
labels.value: Add first product to cart from catalogue page

labels.name: testClass
labels.value: Add first product to cart from catalogue page
